title: São Gonçalo, RJ — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

São Gonçalo is a city in RJ with a population of 1,098,357. The second-most populous city in Rio de Janeiro state, a densely populated suburb with a strong commerce and service sector.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
